mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, sum( taste_score ) totalScore, count( * ) count, sum( taste_score ) / count( * ) avgScore FROM biz_store_comment WHERE pid = 0 GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY avgScore DESC limit 10

SELECT store_id AS storeId, sum( environment_score ) totalScore, count( * ) count, sum( environment_score ) / count( * ) avgScore FROM biz_store_comment WHERE pid = 0 GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY avgScore DESC limit 10

SELECT store_id AS storeId, sum( service_score ) totalScore, count( * ) count, sum( service_score ) / count( * ) avgScore FROM biz_store_comment WHERE pid = 0 GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY avgScore DESC limit 10
